plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Implementation Plan: `ImageTextToTextPipeline`

Only **`src/pipelines.js`** needs to be modified. Four targeted edits:

---

### Edit 1 — Import `AutoModelForImageTextToText` (~line 44)
Add to the existing `import { ... } from './models.js'` block after `AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction`:
```js
AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,
AutoModelForImageTextToText,   // ← add this
PreTrainedModel,
```

---

### Edit 2 — New `ImageTextToTextPipeline` class (after `ImageToTextPipeline`, ~line 2005)
Follows the exact same JSDoc pattern (Single typedef → Output typedef → Callback typedef → PipelineType typedef → class-level docs with example). The `_call(image, text, generate_kwargs)` method:

1. `prepareImages(image)` → `this.processor(preparedImage)` → `{ pixel_values }`
2. `this.tokenizer(text, { padding, truncation })` → `{ input_ids, attention_mask }`
3. `this.model.generate({ inputs: input_ids, pixel_values, attention_mask, ...generate_kwargs })`  
   *(text `input_ids` is the primary generation driver; `pixel_values` is the visual kwarg — matching how `imageTextToTextForward` in `models.js` is wired)*
4. `this.tokenizer.batch_decode(output, { skip_special_tokens: true })` → `.map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))`
5. Returns `[{ generated_text: '...' }]`

Uses `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` (both tokenizer + processor), same as the two reference classes.

---

### Edit 3 — Register in `SUPPORTED_TASKS` (after `"image-to-text"`, ~line 3255)
```js
"image-text-to-text": {
    "tokenizer": AutoTokenizer,
    "pipeline": ImageTextToTextPipeline,
    "model": AutoModelForImageTextToText,
    "processor": AutoProcessor,
    "default": { "model": "onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft" },
    "type": "multimodal",
},
```

---

### Edit 4 — Add to `pipeline()` JSDoc bullet list (~line 3427)
```
 *  - `"image-to-text"`: will return a `ImageToTextPipeline`.
 *  - `"image-text-to-text"`: will return a `ImageTextToTextPipeline`.   ← add
 *  - `"object-detection"`: will return a `ObjectDetectionPipeline`.
```

details.command: node -e "const p = require('./src/pipelines.js'); if (typeof p.ImageTextToTextPipeline !== 'function') { process.exit(1); } console.log('OK')"
